creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
Jgraph is a utility to create postscript graphs.  I chose
the "graphics" category, but "math" might be ok too.

This is the first port I've created, so any stylistic comments
would be appreciated.

Fix: 

http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/jgraph-port.tar
How-To-Repeat: N/A
